title: P1: Fix safety config merge eroding default deny list
description:
The AgentBackgroundService.DeniedCommands property uses an XOR switch: it returns EITHER the config entries OR the built-in 35+ entry defaults, never a merge. Configuring any value replaces the entire default list, silently removing protections like /ban, /stop, /execute, /gamemode, /fill.

Additionally, SafetyOptions.DeniedCommands defaults to an empty set. The real defaults live in AgentBackgroundService.DefaultDeniedCommands. Configuring any value replaces the comprehensive built-in list wholesale.

Fix: Merge config with defaults instead of replacing. Make config additive-only (config items can add to defaults but cannot remove them). Normalize SafetyOptions.DeniedCommands entries (add leading slash) before they reach AgentBackgroundService.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P1-8 [PR], P2-8 [PR]
